sub: Agency owners who were juggling freelancers, turning down projects, and capping their own growth. Here's what changed.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.title: Founder & CEO
testimonials.metricLabel: more work delivered, same team size
testimonials.quote: We went from turning away projects to delivering three times more work without a single hire. The quality is indistinguishable from what we'd do in-house — our clients have no idea.

testimonials.name: Marcus Rodriguez
testimonials.title: Managing Partner
testimonials.quote: We quoted a client four weeks. growX had it done in ten days. Our client thought we had a fifty-person team running it. That's the kind of leverage this gives you.

testimonials.name: Emily Thompson
testimonials.title: Agency Owner
testimonials.quote: I was skeptical about quality at first. Forty-seven projects later, I trust growX with our most demanding clients. The work is exceptional — every single time.

testimonials.name: David Lee
testimonials.title: Creative Director
testimonials.quote: Completely seamless. Our clients have no idea. The handoff is smooth, communication is clear, every project comes back exactly as scoped. They feel like an extension of our team.
